temples.name: Mahabodhi Temple
temples.description: Marks the place of the Buddha's enlightenment. UNESCO World Heritage Site.

temples.name: Temple of the Sacred Tooth Relic
temples.address: Sri Dalada Veediya, Kandy, Sri Lanka
temples.description: Houses the relic of the tooth of the Buddha; major pilgrimage site.

temples.name: Wat Phra Kaew
temples.address: Na Phra Lan Rd, Phra Borom Maha Ratchawang, Phra Nakhon, Bangkok
temples.description: Temple of the Emerald Buddha within the Grand Palace complex.

temples.name: Shwedagon Pagoda
temples.description: Golden pagoda enshrining relics of four Buddhas; landmark of Myanmar.

temples.name: Angkor Wat
temples.description: Originally a Mahayana Buddhist then Hindu temple; now a Buddhist site of national significance.
temples.attribution_note: Use licensed images only on production CDN.
